task_completion.description: Navigate to the Introduction to Biology course
task_completion.visual_evidence: Moodle interface showing the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course page.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Biology Lab Notebook' wiki activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page lists a wiki activity named 'Biology Lab Notebook', or the wiki settings page is visible with the name and description 'Collaborative wiki for documenting lab procedures, terminology, and study notes'.

task_completion.description: Save the first page 'Lab Safety Procedures' with the correct content
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wiki page titled 'Lab Safety Procedures' is displayed in view mode, containing the text 'Always wear safety goggles and gloves when handling chemicals'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of the second page 'Cell Structure Notes'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A link to 'Cell Structure Notes' is visible (e.g., created using double brackets [[Cell Structure Notes]] on the first page), or the 'New page' creation screen for 'Cell Structure Notes' is shown.

task_completion.description: Save the second page 'Cell Structure Notes' with the correct content
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wiki page titled 'Cell Structure Notes' is displayed in view mode, containing the text 'The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Moodle, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: The wiki pages are genuinely created within the Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: The content is displayed within the standard Moodle layout (with navigation blocks, header, footer), not in a plain text editor or isolated HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM text to falsely show the required page titles or content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: BIO101. Wiki Name: 'Biology Lab Notebook'. Wiki Mode: collaborative. Page 1 Title: 'Lab Safety Procedures'. Page 1 Content must include the fragment 'safety goggles'. Page 2 Title: 'Cell Structure Notes'. Page 2 Content must include the fragment 'mitochondria'.
